title: Section 34
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in the 1 [Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962),] no arms or ammunition shall be deposited in any warehouse licensed under 2 [section 58] of that Act without the sanction of the Central Government.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 25 of 1983, s. 13, for "Sea Customs Act, 1878 (8 of 1878)" (w.e.f. 22-6-1983). 2. Subs. by s. 13, ibid., for "section 16" (w.e.f. 22-6-1983).
